name: Homenema Technology Incorporation
summary: Homenema Technology Incorporation manufactures and sells professional pre-recorded optic discs in Taiwan. The company offers compact discs (CDs) consisting of audio and video CDs, as well as mixed mode, ROM, and card CDs; and digital versatile discs. It also provides packaging services. The company's products are used in digital music and videos, gaming, software, and business cards applications. Homenema Technology Incorporation was founded in 1997 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.
